caption: A man wearing glasses, a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, peaked wig sits in a studio setting. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing displays, including items branded with "LEE." To his left and right, on-screen graphics appear: one reads "PODCAST" under a logo that says "ESTALBIO," and the other reads "SS TALK JOY" with "LILY'S STUDIO" in smaller text below. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expression and mouth position. By the end of the clip, he raises his right hand, pointing a finger toward himself as he continues to talk.
